name: The Sleuth Kit
description: Library and CLI tools to analyze disk images and file systems. Tool: https://www.sleuthkit.org. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #95 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map The Sleuth Kit output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved The Sleuth Kit output file to parse instead of running it live.
